svg.title: Project C — AI-Powered Document Pipeline
svg.desc: S3 intake triggers Lambda extraction via Textract and Bedrock Claude vision, stores structured records in DynamoDB, exposes a query API with optional natural language layer via Bedrock, all provisioned with Terraform and deployed via GitHub Actions.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the upload interface for Project C')
sendPrompt('How does the S3 intake bucket work in Project C?')
sendPrompt('What goes in the S3 processed bucket in Project C?')
sendPrompt('What does the extraction Lambda do in Project C?')
sendPrompt('What does Textract do in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does Bedrock Claude vision work in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What does the merge and summarize Lambda do?')
sendPrompt('What prompt does Bedrock use to generate the summary?')
sendPrompt('What SNS notification fires when a document is processed?')
sendPrompt('How is DynamoDB structured for processed documents in Project C?')
sendPrompt('What endpoints does the query API expose in Project C?')
sendPrompt('What does the query Lambda do in Project C?')
sendPrompt('How does the natural language query layer work in Project C?')
sendPrompt('What does Terraform provision in Project C?')
sendPrompt('What does the GitHub Actions pipeline do for Project C?')
sendPrompt('What does CloudWatch monitor in Project C?')
